events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Former Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Eighty-six years young! The iconic beat behind The Beatles, Ringo Starr, is celebrating his birthday. What's your favourite Ringo moment, on or off the drums?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God & Star Gazer
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to Queen's legendary guitarist, Sir Brian May! From stadium rock anthems to astrophysics, is there anything this man can't do? What's your favourite Brian May riff?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' iconic frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still commanding the stage! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your top Rolling Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched, playing 'Video Killed The Radio Star'
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV launched in the US, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star?
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star.' Did video really kill the radio star, or just give them a new stage?

events.title: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' released
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which became the fastest-selling debut album in British history at the time.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped their seminal debut 'Definitely Maybe'! What's the track from the album that still gives you that Britpop swagger?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Remembering Woodstock
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. If you could have been there, which artist would you have most wanted to see?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', died on August 16, 1977, at the age of 42.

angles.name: Tribute to The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years since we lost the King of Rock and Roll. Remembering Elvis Presley today, who would have been 91. What's your all-time favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's shooting
events.blurb: Rapper Tupac Shakur was shot in a drive-by shooting in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and died from his injuries six days later on September 13, 1996, at the age of 25.

angles.name: Tupac Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the legendary Tupac Shakur, who was tragically shot on this day in 1996. His influence on music and culture remains undeniable. What's his most impactful song for you?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Guitar icon Jimi Hendrix died on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Legacy
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since the world lost a true guitar visionary, Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84. His music continues to inspire generations. What's your favourite Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' released
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on September 26, 1969, featuring the famous zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most recognisable in history! What's your go-to track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde's Day
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her distinctive voice and songwriting have given us so many classics. Which Pretenders song is your favourite?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: LG's Birthday
angles.copy: Our Kid is 54 today! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite Liam vocal – Oasis or solo?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic song 'Imagine' on October 11, 1971, as the title track of his second solo album.

angles.name: Imagine's Message
angles.copy: Fifty-five years ago, John Lennon gave the world 'Imagine'. Its message of peace and unity resonates just as strongly today. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music players.

angles.name: iPod Revolution
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, Apple dropped the original iPod and changed how we listen to music forever. How many songs did you cram onto your first iPod?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Sixty-four years since 'Dr. No' hit screens. Who's your favourite Bond and what's the ultimate Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles songwriter and peace activist John Lennon would have celebrated his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire. What's the Lennon lyric that stays with you?
